creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wxs         2008-11-12 15:01:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    misc                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    misc/p5-Business-Hours Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module is a simple tool for calculating business hours in a time
  period. Over time, additional functionality will be added to make it
  easy to calculate the number of business hours between arbitrary
  dates.
  
  PR:             ports/126778
  Submitted by:   Matthew Seaman <m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.895     +1 -0      ports/misc/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/misc/p5-Business-Hours/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/misc/p5-Business-Hours/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/misc/p5-Business-Hours/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/misc/p5-Business-Hours/pkg-plist (new)
